summary: 19/19 backend pytest passed; frontend login, navbar pills, market table (25+ rows), trade modal BUY (ABCAPITAL), Portfolio (holdings+sector donut+Reset), History and Leaderboard (BULL/TRADER/HODLER/YOU badges) all functional with live WS prices.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py ~470 lines - still acceptable but consider splitting auth/trade/leaderboard into routers as app grows
leaderboard endpoint recomputes real users' current values in-app each call; fine for small N but will need aggregation/cache at scale
signup/login rate_limit keyed on request.client.host; behind ingress this may collapse to one IP - consider X-Forwarded-For
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral users via /api/auth/signup (prefix 't<uuid>'); portfolio/reset clears state each run
context_for_next_testing_agent: WS endpoint at /api/ws?token=<jwt>. BUY fillPrice uses cached NSE price (ignores client price). Market is CLOSED off-hours but cache populated. data-testids present: tab-login, tab-signup, submit-auth.
